specific_question: How many API authentication log entries did the cybersecurity specialist at MediConn manually review on July 15, 2025?
answer: On July 15, 2025, the cybersecurity specialist manually reviewed 180 API authentication log entries across MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform as part of a high-level spot check to verify that no third-party integrations were using expired or duplicated access tokens.
dr_question: By Q4 2025, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the HHS Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs) into its virtual healthcare platform to ensure compliance for both internal systems and third-party vendors, while effectively mitigating emerging cyber threats?
